package rulecoverage

func PositiveInterfaceSliceAllocation() string {
    ruleID := "interface_slice_allocation"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`[]interface{}` or `[]any` used to pass homogeneous typed data"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
